'''Thick Collar''' is a dyable equipable accessory that makes your dog look stylish.
{{Item
| image = wool_collar_thicc.png
| id = wool_collar_thicc
| type = Customization
| Subtype = Dyeable
| stackable = 64
}}

== Obtaining ==
=== Crafting ===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Ingredients
! Recipe
|-
| Wool <br>+ Wool Collar
| [[File:wool_collar_thicc_crafting.png]]
|}
== Usage ==
{{Accessory_use}}

== Trivia ==
* It was introduced in DTN 1.18.11.
